name: Kurt Vonnegut
abstract: Kurt Vonnegut ( VON-ə-gət; November 11, 1922 – April 11, 2007) was an American author known for his satirical and darkly humorous novels. His published work includes fourteen novels, three short-story collections, five plays, and five nonfiction works over fifty years; further works have been published since his death.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Blue
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee responds to the interviewer's quote from Kurt Vonnegut by agreeing with the sentiment ('I agree with what he said'), indicating awareness of the author and his work, but no personal interaction is described.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Blue interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 23, 2022
